calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Lee Ratcliff II in pro per, Respondents/Plaintiffs
Olumide K. Obayemi, Esq., Appellant/Defendant, Mr. Willie Ratcliff also present.

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. Stipulation to pro tem judge signed. Mr. Lee Ratcliff III claimed that his name on printed calendar is incorrect, the name should be Ratcliff II not Ratcliff III. upon the proof on the file, Court agreed with the change. Mr. Lee Ratcliff II testified and examined on his own behalf and cross examined by Mr. Obayemi. Mr. Ratcliff II introduced some photographs and returned. After both sides presented oral and documentary evidence to the court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Michael J. Raifsnider, Judge Pro Tem; Clerk: Leelay Chin/not reported (D.525)

introduced numerous new exhibits at this hearing including photographs
